creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Remove unnecessary PKGNAMEPREFIX declaration
- Remove MD5 obsolete MD5 checksum while I'm here

For ports of localization versions, we have pre-defined PKGNAMEPREFIX,
e.g. ar- for arabic/*. This patch removes PKGNAMEPREFIX from the ports
having PKGNAMEPREFIX in their Makefile which equals to the default
PKGNAMEPREFIX of their category.

Here's the list of affected ports:
arabic/kde3-i18n
arabic/koffice-i18n
chinese/CJKUnifonts
chinese/CNS11643-font
chinese/docproj
chinese/fortune
chinese/fqterm
chinese/qterm
french/MT
french/kde3-i18n
french/koffice-i18n
german/MT
german/kde3-i18n
german/koffice-i18n
german/schwobifyer
german/selfhtml
german/vtiger
german/webalizer2
german/wordpress
japanese/MT
japanese/dvipsk
japanese/kde3-i18n
japanese/koffice-i18n
japanese/latex2html
japanese/mutt-devel
japanese/platex-jsclasses
japanese/ptex
japanese/teTeX
japanese/texfamily
japanese/webalizer
japanese/xdvik
korean/kde3-i18n
polish/kde3-i18n
polish/koffice-i18n
polish/webalizer2
portuguese/kde3-i18n
portuguese/koffice-i18n
russian/MT
russian/kde3-i18n
russian/koffice-i18n
ukrainian/kde3-i18n
ukrainian/koffice-i18n
vietnamese/kde3-i18n

Fix: 

The patch is at http://people.FreeBSD.org/~sunpoet/l10n-ports-PKGNAMEPREFIX.patch
